content_type: designed quote card (photo + social post overlay)
description: A polished, professionally designed White House quote-card graphic. The full-bleed background is a moody, desaturated black-and-white photograph of President Donald Trump seated in a tufted leather chair (Oval Office / Cabinet Room setting), looking sternly toward the camera with an American-flag lapel pin visible. A heavy dark vignette frames the image. Overlaid in the lower portion is a rendered white social-media post card with Trump's circular American-flag-painted avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump' with magenta verification and black subscription badges, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The quoted post text reads: 'I will soon be reviewing the plan that Iran has just sent to us, but can’t imagine that it would be acceptable in that they have not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP' — with the first line highlighted in bright yellow marker for emphasis. At the bottom center is the engraved White House building logo with 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark. The design technique combines a stern presidential portrait with a highlighted hardline quote to project resolve and dominance toward Iran. Target audience is the general public and foreign-policy observers.
notable_text: 'I will soon be reviewing the plan that Iran has just sent to us, but can’t imagine that it would be acceptable in that they have not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years.'
